# Grounded reqIds from live paper gateway (server_version 200).
# Wire evidence: client sends [8, 1, numIds=1], server replies [9, 1, order_id].
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260411 20:12:16 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DUP770846"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2104,"message":"Market data farm connection is OK:usfarm","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775931136087"}
client req_ids {"num_ids":"1"}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":2}
disconnect
